title: Statistics on the one-time emergency payment increase to the Canada Child Benefit (CCB) - Open Government Portal
content:
## Statistics on the one-time emergency payment increase to the Canada Child Benefit (CCB)
Counts and amounts of entitled individuals and the total amount, demonstrated by age, gender, and province of residence. Valid at end of August 2020.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Canada Revenue Agency
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Explanatory Notes CSV English guide CSV Explore Preview Download
- Explanatory Notes CSV French guide CSV Explore More information Download

- Statistics on the one-time emergency payment increase to the Canada Child Benefit (CCB) CSV French dataset CSV Explore More information Download
